title: TaskType enum + per-task CapsulePolicyTable
goal: Define the closed TaskType enum that drives capsule generation policy per task type per D.1 (refinement: 'capsule generation policy per task type') and ship a static CapsulePolicyTable mapping TaskType -> default RetrievalPolicy. Initial TaskType variants cover the kernel-004 in-scope task surfaces: ValidatorHbrTestPacket, KernelBuilderMtImplementation, IntegrationValidatorBatchReview, OperatorTriage, SwarmHarnessSession, ProcessLedgerInspection, SelfImprovementLoopEval, GeneralRetrieval. Each TaskType gets a default policy carrying sane top_k + capsule_budget_bytes + degradation tier appropriate to that surface.
expected_diff_shape: Extends src/backend/handshake_core/src/memory/capsule.rs with `pub enum TaskType { ... }` and adds new file src/backend/handshake_core/src/memory/policy_table.rs with `pub struct CapsulePolicyTable` + `pub fn default_policy_for(task_type: TaskType) -> RetrievalPolicy`. Tests in src/backend/handshake_core/tests/memory_policy_table_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-141 ships MemoryCapsule + RetrievalPolicy + CapsuleAuditLog typed primitives.
implementation_notes: Per AC-DISTILL-EDITABLE-SURFACE the editable surface for the V0 self-improvement loop is exactly (a) ModelManual capsule text and (b) retrieval policy parameters (top_k, capsule_budget_bytes). The policy table is the durable home for those parameters and the loop will mutate this surface via PromotionGate writes (NOT direct mutation). TaskType is a closed enum to give the loop a stable optimization target (cannot optimize an open string set). Initial defaults: ValidatorHbrTestPacket {top_k: 6, capsule_budget_bytes: 32_768, degradation: Strict}, KernelBuilderMtImplementation {top_k: 12, capsule_budget_bytes: 65_536, degradation: Tiered}, IntegrationValidatorBatchReview {top_k: 16, capsule_budget_bytes: 131_072, degradation: Tiered}, OperatorTriage {top_k: 8, capsule_budget_bytes: 49_152, degradation: Strict}, SwarmHarnessSession {top_k: 4, capsule_budget_bytes: 16_384, degradation: Aggressive}, ProcessLedgerInspection {top_k: 8, capsule_budget_bytes: 32_768, degradation: Strict}, SelfImprovementLoopEval {top_k: 6, capsule_budget_bytes: 32_768, degradation: Strict}, GeneralRetrieval {top_k: 10, capsule_budget_bytes: 49_152, degradation: Tiered}. The scoring_formula_version field MUST default to a constant `RETRIEVAL_SCORING_FORMULA_V0` exported from the same module so MT-148 self-improvement-loop reads can pin a version. Tests: every TaskType variant has a default policy; defaults serialize+deserialize stably; budget bytes are powers-of-2-aligned (32k/64k/etc) to keep operator mental model simple.
risk_if_missed: Without a typed TaskType + policy table, every call site picks its own top_k/budget on the fly, the editable surface is undefined, and the self-improvement loop has no stable optimization target.
validator_focus: TaskType is closed (no String fallback). Every variant has a non-zero default policy. Defaults serialize round-trip cleanly.

minimum_controls: TaskType enum is closed; an unknown task type fails compilation rather than silently defaulting.
Policy table defaults are reviewed by operator at promotion; values are not silently auto-tuned outside the self-improvement loop.
Budget values are bounded so a misconfigured policy cannot overflow MemoryPackBudgets caps.
